# Non Ler Multiple Regression

**Summary**: A statistical method used to model the relationship between a dependent variable and multiple independent variables using non-linear functions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-al-kadem|Al-Kadem, 2018]] applied nonlinear multiple regression to develop an empirical correlation for water cut estimation.

## Key Results and Findings

- The correlation was more reliable at low GOR with an average absolute relative percentage error of 8.32%. ([[2018-al-kadem|Al-Kadem, 2018, p. 14]])
